# Good Brief
> Good Brief is a Romanian weekly newsletter and public archive focused on positive news from Romania.

Content on this site is primarily in Romanian. Start with the homepage, about page, and archive. Each issue contains short summaries and links to the original reporting source.

Good Brief is not an original newsroom. The site curates and summarizes articles from other publishers, and links back to those sources.

The site currently exposes curated HTML pages. It does not yet publish markdown mirrors for each linked page.

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://goodbrief.ro/): Overview of the newsletter, subscription entrypoint, and links to the latest published issues.
- [About Good Brief](https://goodbrief.ro/about): What the project is, how it works, how AI is used, editorial boundaries, source trust, and contact details.
- [Issue Archive](https://goodbrief.ro/issues): Full public archive of published issues, ordered from newest to oldest.

## Recent Issues
- [Good Brief #8 · 9 mar 2026](https://goodbrief.ro/issues/2026-03-09-issue): Stradivarius, Kovesi, incluziune, spitale, educație, energie verde.
- [Good Brief #7 · 2 mar 2026](https://goodbrief.ro/issues/2026-03-02-issue): 11 vești bune, fără umplutură: educație, economie și exemple locale care chiar contează.
- [Good Brief #6 · 23 feb 2026](https://goodbrief.ro/issues/2026-02-23-issue): Sport, investiții strategice și sănătate: vești bune din România, cu impact real.

## Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://goodbrief.ro/privacy): Data collected on subscription, analytics usage, storage, GDPR rights, and contact details.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://goodbrief.ro/terms): Service description, content and copyright terms, change policy, and contact details.

## Optional
- [Subscribe](https://goodbrief.ro/#subscribe): Newsletter signup form on the homepage.
